description: Normative IME improvement contracts. PASS means the current tested path satisfies the full stated contract. KNOWN_FAILURE remains an active target and must not be treated as acceptable product behavior; automation states where the missing integration test belongs.

cases.expected: 茨城 is top-1; standalone 荊 is absent
家に is top-1; 家煮 is not top-1; standalone 家 is absent
Commit only the left reading and preserve the right reading verbatim
Editing and deletion operate at the editor cursor without moving or replacing the suffix
Editing and deletion operate at the editor cursor without moving or replacing either side unexpectedly
Editing and deletion operate immediately before the editor cursor
Display ん, keep it unresolved, and do not query conversion candidates
Display pending k and keep it unresolved
Delete one visible kana unit without leaking an invalid raw suffix
Return to EMPTY and expose no selected candidate
Dispatch exactly one context-appropriate space action
Enter cursor mode without cycling candidates or inserting repeated spaces
Move the editor cursor by Unicode grapheme steps and do not commit text
Reverse cursor movement without a stale-direction step
Dispatch no tap, cursor, or commit action
Ignore non-primary pointers and dispatch at most one action
Retain both visually similar candidates
Retain both visually similar candidates
Retain both visually similar candidates
Retain both visually similar candidates
Ranking may reorder but must not filter any supplied candidate
Never split a surrogate pair
Delete the complete user-perceived grapheme, not only U+3099
Delete the complete precomposed dakuten kana
Candidate lookup and deduplication treat NFC-equivalent input identically
